description: A blast crew foreman oversees the execution of a designed blast, including drilling the holes and charging them with explosives.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the drill rig has accurately drilled the holes according to the designed pattern using GPS.

expected_outcome.value: The system confirms all holes are drilled within the specified tolerance.

nodes.task_description: Supervise the charging of each hole with the correct amount and type of explosive as per the loading sheet.

expected_outcome.value: All holes are safely charged according to the plan.

nodes.task_description: Clear the blast area of all personnel and equipment and then fire the blast at the scheduled time.

expected_outcome.value: The blast is executed safely and successfully.
